title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Adds source files for a new insights package under output/cloud/ for the extracted Insights functionality
1.2: Implements a CollectRequestMetadatas method on the collector struct in the new insights package that processes HTTP request trail data
1.3: Implements a PopAll method on the collector struct in the new insights package that returns the buffered request metadata
1.4: Implements a flusher struct in the new insights package with an exported Flush method for sending collected data
1.5: Implements an Enabled function definition in the new insights package that checks if tracing is enabled based on the cloud config
1.6: Exports the RequestMetadatasCollector interface in the new insights package
1.7: Exports a Client interface definition in the new insights package for the insights API dependency
1.8: Exports the RequestMetadatasFlusher interface in the new insights package
1.9: Implements the NewCollector constructor in the new insights package for creating collector instances
1.10: Implements the NewFlusher constructor in the new insights package for creating flusher instances
1.11: Replaces the internal tracingEnabled() call with insightsOutput.Enabled() from the new insights package in output/cloud/expv2/output.go
1.12: Replaces the internal newRequestMetadatasCollector() call with insightsOutput.NewCollector() from the new insights package in output/cloud/expv2/output.go
1.13: Replaces the internal newTracesFlusher() call with insightsOutput.NewFlusher() from the new insights package in output/cloud/expv2/output.go
1.14: Increases the insights client dial timeout to 10 seconds in output/cloud/expv2/output.go
2: Documentation Maintainability
